topic: Creating histograms from frequency tables and describing distributions
latex:
The frequency table shows the number of minutes spent reading by students in your class. Display the data in a histogram. Describe the shape of the distribution.

\begin{center}
\begin{tabular}{|c|c|}
\hline
\textbf{Minutes} & \textbf{Frequency} \\
\hline
$0$--$9$ & 3 \\
\hline
$10$--$19$ & 6 \\
\hline
$20$--$29$ & 10 \\
\hline
$30$--$39$ & 6 \\
\hline
$40$--$49$ & 3 \\
\hline
$50$--$59$ & 2 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
\end{center}
